task: Analyze the provided Git repository fixture and identify code nodes responsible for a private-repo access bug.

issue.title: Private repository summaries are visible to non-owners
issue.body: A logged-in user who does not own a private repository can still load the summary endpoint. The endpoint should reject users without repository access.

comments.body: The graph SVG endpoint is unaffected. The failure happens in the summary request path and permission decision.

tools.name: list_repo_files
tools.description: List bounded Python files in the provided repository.

tools.name: search_repo_symbols
tools.description: Search Python functions/classes in the repository and rank them against issue evidence.

tools.name: search_repo_text
tools.description: Search code text for symptoms and output strings.

tools.name: read_repo_file
tools.description: Read bounded Python file contents from the repository.
